message:
fix(ci): Skip Binaryen tests to avoid googletest dependency

The Binaryen build was failing because it couldn't find googletest
source files (gtest-all.cc). Since we only need wasm-opt and don't
need to run Binaryen's test suite, disable tests with -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF.

files.patch:
@@ -66,8 +66,8 @@ jobs:
           sudo apt-get install -y cmake ninja-build
           git clone --depth 1 --branch version_119 https://github.com/WebAssembly/binaryen.git /tmp/binaryen
           cd /tmp/binaryen
-          git submodule update --init --depth 1
-          cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local .
+          # Skip tests - we don't need googletest submodule
+          cmake -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Release -DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX=/usr/local -DBUILD_TESTS=OFF .
           ninja
           sudo ninja install
           sudo ldconfig
